---
title: Michael Saikali, PhD
image: assets/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links: 
    - text: Github
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/saikalimf
    - text: Bluesky
      icon: bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/michaelsaikali.bsky.social
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaelsaikali/
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I am a Postdoctoral Fellow in Drug Discovery at the Ontario Institute for Cancer Research and Assistant Professor, Teaching Stream at the Leslie Dan Faculty of Pharmacy.

## Education

Leslie Dan Faculty of Pharmacy, University of Toronto | Toronto, Canada | PhD in Pharmaceutical Sciences | April 2025

University of Toronto | Toronto, Canada | BSc in Pharmaceutical Chemistry | June 2016

## Experience

Ontario Institute for Cancer Research | Postdoctoral Fellow, Drug Discovery | April 2025 - present

Leslie Dan Faculty of Pharmacy, University of Toronto | Assistant Professor, Teaching Stream | July 2025 - present

:::
